templates.name: Bright Lab
templates.tagline: Bright candy-colored gallery system with playful blocks, pill CTAs, organic shapes, and generous whitespace.
templates.best_for: Decks and pages that want to feel bright, exploratory, and approachable rather than corporate or futuristic. Personal reviews, wellness summaries, AI tool galleries, creative project showrooms, experimental product launches. Strong when many items need their own identity within a unified container system.
templates.avoid_for: High-luxury brand decks, dark-mood cinematic narratives, single long-form essays, somber or austere material. The candy palette commits to a playful, experimental voice.

templates.name: Bold Violet
templates.tagline: Bold violet product system with cream/lavender surfaces, floating dashboard cards, and confident brand-scale typography.
templates.best_for: Decks that need high visual identity and brand confidence. SaaS product reports, e-commerce annual summaries, brand growth presentations. Strong when you want to commit fully to a single bold color system rather than generic blue-white SaaS.
templates.avoid_for: Multi-color rainbow schemes, luxury minimal aesthetics, finance content requiring trust through restraint.

templates.name: Dark Utility
templates.tagline: Purposeful dark utility style with near-black surfaces, a single muted accent, and product-first restraint.
templates.best_for: Tool and utility app showcases, open-source software presentations, developer-focused products that want to feel as purposeful as the tool itself.
templates.avoid_for: Consumer lifestyle products, warm personal narratives, anything requiring color expressiveness or warmth.

templates.name: Enterprise Dark
templates.tagline: Enterprise-grade dark technical style with charcoal foundations, restrained warm accents, and authoritative scale.
templates.best_for: Enterprise AI, developer API platforms, B2B SaaS products that need to feel like serious infrastructure rather than consumer tools.
templates.avoid_for: Consumer products, personal narratives, content that needs warmth or playfulness.

templates.name: Calm Process
templates.tagline: Calm white-blue process style for step-by-step guidance, reassuring dashboards, and trustworthy onboarding.
templates.best_for: Consumer finance, personal tool onboarding, step-by-step process explanations, mobile app presentations. Ideal when content needs to feel manageable and non-threatening.
templates.avoid_for: Dark-mode content, high-energy product launches, luxury or premium aesthetics.

templates.name: Warm Team
templates.tagline: Warm professional team style with navy/off-white rhythm and friendly geometric accents.
templates.best_for: HR tech, people management, SMB SaaS products, team culture and engagement presentations. Best when content needs to feel professional but warm.
templates.avoid_for: Consumer products (too formal) or large enterprise products (too intimate).

templates.name: Editorial Minimal
templates.tagline: Premium editorial restraint: pure white, near-black type, extreme whitespace, and typography-led hierarchy.
templates.best_for: Publishing, newsletter, creator economy, open-source developer products. For content where the message itself is the product.
templates.avoid_for: Products needing visual energy, color-driven brand identity, dark or immersive experiences.

templates.name: Quiet Paper
templates.tagline: Paper-like productivity style with warm white surfaces, subtle borders, serif titles, and highlighter-like accents.
templates.best_for: AI writing, meeting notes, knowledge work, personal productivity tools. Products that want to feel like 'a clean native notes app that became intelligent' rather than an AI dashboard.
templates.avoid_for: High-energy launches, colorful brand identity, dark/cinematic experiences.

templates.name: Indie Print
templates.tagline: Indie creator print style with white base, thick black borders, hard shadows, and direct handmade energy.
templates.best_for: Creator economy showcases, independent maker presentations, digital product launches, personal project pages. For content where 'anyone can do this' accessibility is the message.
templates.avoid_for: B2B enterprise, luxury brands, products needing visual sophistication or multi-color expression.

templates.name: Raw Copy
templates.tagline: Copy-as-design style with warm cream backdrops, fragmented typography, and intentionally imperfect life-like rhythm.
templates.best_for: Consumer lifestyle apps, parenting/family products, personal projects with strong authentic copy voice. When the emotional resonance of the words IS the product.
templates.avoid_for: B2B products, enterprise tools, any product needing formal credibility signals.

templates.name: Cinematic Dark
templates.tagline: Cinematic dark stage with near-black immersion, one vivid action color, and content-wall drama.
templates.best_for: Entertainment, media, subscription products. Dark immersive experiences where content is the desire. High-conversion pages where the content library itself is the argument.
templates.avoid_for: Quiet knowledge tools, personal notes products, content requiring warmth or approachability.

templates.name: Workspace Matrix
templates.tagline: Systematic workspace matrix with dark-to-light rhythm, functional color blocks, and feature-suite storytelling.
templates.best_for: AI workspace products, team collaboration suites, productivity app matrices. When you need to show how many different things work together as a unified system.
templates.avoid_for: Single-feature tools, high-luxury minimal aesthetics, content needing dark immersion throughout.

templates.name: Knowledge Night
templates.tagline: Focused night-workspace style for knowledge systems, private research, and graph-like thinking surfaces.
templates.best_for: Personal knowledge bases, PKM tools, writing apps, developer tools with depth. When the product is a private thinking space and long-term ownership of information is the value proposition.
templates.avoid_for: Light consumer products, social entertainment, high-conversion sales pages, warm personal narratives.

templates.name: Photo Editorial
templates.tagline: Photography magazine editorial style with stark black/white structure, oversized headlines, and hard color-block mosaics.
templates.best_for: Photography tools, creator communities, visual product platforms, creative professionals. When real photography can carry the visual work.
templates.avoid_for: B2B enterprise, quiet minimalist aesthetics, personal narratives without strong visual material.

templates.name: Literary Flow
templates.tagline: Warm editorial flow style with cream paper, deep green anchors, serif headlines, and calm motion cues.
templates.best_for: AI writing, voice dictation, personal workflow, creator-adjacent productivity tools. When the product needs to feel warm and human rather than cold and technical.
templates.avoid_for: Enterprise B2B, heavy data dashboards, high-density technical content, formal financial presentations.

templates.name: B2B Blue
templates.tagline: High-conversion B2B style with white/pale-blue surfaces, bright action blue, and structured credibility sections.
templates.best_for: B2B SaaS, enterprise collaboration, sales decks with clear pricing and ROI messaging. When conversion is the primary goal and structural completeness matters more than aesthetic personality.
templates.avoid_for: Consumer products, content needing strong personality or artistic expression, anything requiring warmth or playfulness.
